actions.intent: Break the key ice on the rescue route before spending actions on side value.
Open the right side of the puppy and show immediate rescue progress from the ice investment.
Stabilize the dock with a clean B clear while staying near the rescue lane.
Open the left side and bring the puppy to one-clear-away.
Cash a B triple before the final route clear.
Use a low-residue side clear to keep the dock recoverable.
Accept a brief full-dock warning while preserving the final rescue clear.
Clear the final route side and extract the puppy.

notes: Designer golden for the ice-route teach: break ice first, preserve dock, then finish the puppy.
